headline: MOH Wins Illinois Medicaid Contract, Reinforcing Long-Term Stability
summary: Molina Healthcare secures an Illinois Medicaid managed care contract starting in 2027, reinforcing its position in a key market and supporting long-term growth.

headline: UnitedHealth, FTC reach proposed settlement in insulin case
summary: The tentative deal comes months after CVS Health reached a proposed settlement in the lawsuit alleging major pharmacy benefit managers are inflating insulin costs.

headline: CVS Health (CVS): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q1 Earnings?
summary: Over the past six months, CVS Health has been a great trade, beating the S&P 500 by 20%. Its stock price has climbed to $100.39, representing a healthy 26.4% increase. This was partly thanks to its solid quarterly results, and the run-up might have investors contemplating their next move.

headline: Is CVS (CVS) Using GLP-1 Access and AI Tools to Redefine Its Healthcare Moat?
summary: In recent days, CVS Health expanded access to GLP-1 weight management drugs, reintroducing Zepbound and easing restrictions on new oral therapies, while also advancing AI-driven tools across its pharmacy, insurance and care delivery platforms. Together, these moves highlight how CVS is trying to pair broader drug affordability with technology-led efficiencies in care delivery and operations. Next, we’ll examine how CVS’s broader GLP-1 coverage and affordability push could influence the...
